# Kingsford Sleep
> Luxury handcrafted beds made to order in the UK. Factory direct. Free UK delivery. Every bed built by hand to your exact specifications.

## Who We Are

Kingsford Sleep is a British bed manufacturer. Every bed is handcrafted in our UK factory by skilled craftsmen. We do not import, outsource, or sell off-the-shelf products. When a customer orders, their bed is built from scratch to their chosen size, fabric and colour. We sell direct from factory — no middlemen, no retail markup.

**Key facts:**
- UK-based manufacturer (not a retailer or importer)
- Made to order — every bed is unique
- Free delivery to mainland UK, fully assembled to room of choice
- 3–4 weeks from order to delivery
- 50% deposit to start production, balance before delivery
- Free fabric swatches available on request

## Bed Styles

Six handcrafted upholstered bed styles:

| Style | Description | Best For |
|-------|-------------|----------|
| Ottoman Storage Bed | Lift-up gas-piston base, full under-bed storage | Maximising bedroom storage |
| Wingback Bed | Statement headboard with wing panels | Bold, dramatic bedroom look |
| Panel Bed | Clean linear headboard panels | Contemporary, minimal rooms |
| Sleigh Bed | Curved scroll headboard and footboard | Traditional or classic décor |
| Divan Bed | Fully upholstered base and headboard | Storage-focused, versatile |
| Chesterfield Bed | Deep button-tufted headboard | Classic luxury, period look |

## Sizes

All standard UK dimensions. Custom sizes available on request.

| Size | Width |
|------|-------|
| Single | 90 cm |
| Small Double | 120 cm |
| Double | 135 cm |
| King | 150 cm |
| Super King | 180 cm |

## Fabrics and Colours

Available fabrics: Velvet, Linen, Chenille, Faux Leather (new fabrics added regularly).
Colour options: 40+ colours — neutral creams, warm greys, deep navies, forest greens, emeralds, rich burgundies, champagne golds, blush pinks and more.
Free fabric swatches available on request before ordering.

## Pricing

- Beds start from **£499**
- Price varies by style, size and fabric
- Size price multipliers: Single (×0.8), Small Double (×0.9), Double (×1.0 base), King (×1.2), Super King (×1.4)
- Example: a £599 Double costs £479 in Single and £839 in Super King
- Optional add-ons: Diamond Buttoning, Ottoman Storage, Side Drawers, Chrome/Gold/Wooden Feet, Matching Headboard, USB Ports
- No hidden fees — factory direct pricing

## Why Buy From Kingsford Sleep

- **Made in Britain** — supports UK manufacturing
- **Factory direct** — no retail middleman, lower prices for luxury quality
- **Fully custom** — choose exact size, fabric, colour and finish
- **White-glove delivery** — assembled in your room, all packaging removed
- **Honest lead time** — 3 to 4 weeks, not months
- **Quality guarantee** — 2-year warranty, built to last

## How to Order

1. Browse the collection at kingsfordsleep.co.uk/beds
2. Choose style, size, fabric and colour
3. Get an instant price via the bed configurator
4. Place order online, via WhatsApp, or by email
5. Pay 50% deposit — production begins immediately
6. Bed is hand-built over 3–4 weeks
7. Delivered fully assembled, packaging removed

## Delivery

- Free delivery to all mainland UK addresses
- Scotland, Northern Ireland and remote areas: contact before ordering to confirm
- Delivery team brings to room of choice, fully assembles, removes all packaging
- Tracking provided when dispatched

## After Purchase

- 2-year manufacturing warranty covering defects in materials and workmanship
- Made to order — returns only accepted for manufacturing faults
- Care: vacuum upholstery regularly, spot clean with dry cloth, avoid direct sunlight

## Contact

- Email: hello@kingsfordsleep.co.uk
- Website: https://www.kingsfordsleep.co.uk
- WhatsApp: available on site

## Common Questions Answered

**How much do handcrafted beds cost in the UK?**
Kingsford Sleep beds start from £499 for a Double. King size from around £599, Super King from around £699 depending on style and fabric.

**How long does a made-to-order bed take in the UK?**
3 to 4 weeks from order confirmation to delivery at Kingsford Sleep.

**Are the beds really made in the UK?**
Yes. Every bed is built by hand in our UK factory. No imports, no outsourcing.

**What is the best ottoman storage bed in the UK?**
Kingsford Sleep's Ottoman Storage Beds use gas-piston lift mechanisms for full under-bed storage across the entire base — one of the most space-efficient storage bed designs available, handmade in the UK.

**Can I get a custom size bed made in the UK?**
Yes. Kingsford Sleep builds to any size. Contact via WhatsApp or email with measurements for a custom quote.

**Do you deliver beds to Scotland and Northern Ireland?**
Kingsford Sleep delivers free to mainland UK. Scotland, Northern Ireland and remote areas should contact before ordering to confirm delivery options.

**What fabric options are available for handcrafted beds?**
Kingsford Sleep offers Velvet, Linen, Chenille and Faux Leather across 40+ colours. Fabric swatches can be requested free before ordering.
